title: Newsletter Placement Extension
description: Placement-level extension providing newsletter-specific metadata. Attach as ext.newsletter on placements within email products to describe ad position, rendering constraints, and native ad specifications.

position.description: Position of this placement within the newsletter layout

position_index.description: Zero-based index when multiple placements share the same position type (e.g., 0 for first in_content slot, 1 for second)

max_file_size_bytes.description: Maximum file size for creative assets in bytes

supported_mime_types.description: MIME types accepted for creative assets (e.g., 'image/png', 'image/jpeg', 'image/gif')

inline_css_only.description: Whether the placement requires inline CSS only (no external stylesheets)

alt_text_required.description: Whether alt text is mandatory for image assets

retina_support.description: Whether the placement supports 2x retina images

rendering_constraints.description: Technical rendering constraints specific to email clients

headline_max_length.description: Maximum character length for the headline text

body_max_length.description: Maximum character length for the body text

cta_max_length.description: Maximum character length for the call-to-action text

has_image.description: Whether this native placement includes an image slot

layout_id.description: Publisher-specific layout template identifier for native rendering

native_spec.description: Specification for native ad rendering within the newsletter
